---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve Pre-Diligence Lab
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps

1. e.g. Open the app
2. e.g. Click the "..." button
3. e.g. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or attach `~/.prediligencelab/app.log` content (PII redacted).

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11 23H2, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version (if running from source): [e.g. 3.11.9]
- App version: [e.g. v1.4.0 — see title bar or "About"]
- LLM provider (if relevant): [e.g. OpenAI / DeepSeek / None]

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be relevant.
